title: Assistant Store Manager - FitOn - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - FitOn - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, FitOn in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FitOn:
FitOn is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn!
